raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: Anime character intro followed by high-stakes slot machine gameplay.
hook.visual_action: A rabbit-eared anime girl turns around in a moonlit scene, transitioning into a slot machine spin with multipliers.
hook.text_overlay:
룰렛 돌리다 달나라 갔다옴 ㅋ
윈조이포커 신규 슬롯 오픈

scene_flow: Intro featuring an anime character in a moonlit festival setting.
Gameplay footage of a slot machine landing winning combinations and multipliers.
High-energy 'MEGA WIN' animation with gold coins.
End card with game logo and 'Go to the moon now' call-to-action.
audience_proxy: Adult Korean mobile gamers who enjoy social casino and slot machine games.
